# Riggins Strategic Solutions

<!--
  Update when: new product launches, major blog category added, or company
  facts change. NOT required for individual blog posts. The sitemap,
  Article schema, and RSS feed cover per-post discovery automatically.
-->

> Consumer protection advisor helping adult children (40-65) navigate their parents' senior transitions. Education-first, not a realtor pitch. Run by Ryan Riggins, licensed NC broker with 8+ years construction project management and house flipping experience.

## Key Resources
- [Blueprint Premium](https://rigginsstrategicsolutions.com/blueprint-premium): $297 complete senior transition plan with a 60-minute call and 90 days of email support.
- [Blueprint Core](https://rigginsstrategicsolutions.com/the-blueprint): $47 19-module DIY course covering the full senior transition process.
- [SeniorSafe App](https://rigginsstrategicsolutions.com/seniorsafe-app): $14.99/month family coordination app. Daily check-ins, shared family channel, medication log, document vault.
- [Free Starter Guide](https://rigginsstrategicsolutions.com/freeguide): The Simple Blueprint, a free plain-English starter guide for families beginning a senior transition.
- [Work With Ryan](https://rigginsstrategicsolutions.com/work-with-ryan): Book a free 30-minute strategy call. No pitch.

## Blog Topics
- Senior transitions: downsizing, moving, housing decisions
- Consumer protection: wholesalers, investor offers, predatory real estate practices targeting seniors
- Family coordination during elderly parent transitions
- Net proceeds planning and avoiding the $50K mistakes

## Contact
- Email: ryan@rigginsstrategicsolutions.com
- Phone: (336) 553-8933
- Based in Greensboro, North Carolina. Serving families nationwide.

## About Ryan
Ryan Riggins is a Senior Transition Advisor. Licensed NC broker (#361546, eXp Realty). Full fiduciary duty to the family, not a pitch. Not a traditional listing agent and not a move manager. The advisor who helps families avoid the $50K mistakes.
